artifact: Rental verifier PRICE row for a studio against a 'monthly rent <= $1,500' filter. Quoted from the detail page: 'Lease terms: $16,800 total for a 12-month lease. Available now.' The verifier's row reads: 'Rent quoted from page: $1,400/mo (derived from lease total). $1,400 <= $1,500. PASS.' No standalone '$X/month' figure appears in the quoted page text.
failure_mode: right-shaped-but-wrong number (a derived/total figure standing in for the quoted monthly rent)
source: loop-team/roles/verifier.md L10 -- "a deposit / 'starting at' / total-derived number standing in for the real one" is a genuine gap. ; fix_plan.md skill-rental-deposit-as-rent -- a non-rent figure passed off as the monthly rent.
why_hard: The arithmetic is internally correct ($16,800/12 = $1,400) and the result clears the filter, so the row looks both sourced and compliant; the defect is that a derived number was substituted for a directly-quoted monthly rent.
objective_fact: The page quote gives only a 12-month lease TOTAL ($16,800), not a quoted monthly rent; per verifier.md a total-derived number standing in for the real monthly figure is an unconfirmed price, so the PASS is unsupported.
